comparison_method: Re-rank candidate rewrites with each scorer; the chosen rewrite per sample is its 'best'. Then evaluate Pr(...) using existing Gemma rollouts + DeepSeek-V4-Pro judges.

scorers.lr_probe: LogisticRegression(C=1.0) on mean-pooled L32 residuals, fit on all 832 refusal samples (lr_probe.npz)
scorers.arditi_direction: unit-norm refusal direction = mean(refused) - mean(complied) on mean-pooled L32 features (arditi_direction.npy from exp 11)

best_rewrite_agreement: 32 of 81 prompts have arditi-best == lr-best. On the 49 disagreeing prompts, LR's pick achieves materially higher Pr(model flipped).
interpretation: LR > Arditi as a SCORER. The Arditi direction is fine for per-token ATTRIBUTION (exp 12) but undershoots when used to pick which rewrite actually flips Gemma. Validates the 'two different f's' design from extra_omar/notes.md.
